---
name: Improvement (English)
about: Propose an optimization or refinement to existing behavior or design
title: '[IMPROVEMENT] '
labels: enhancement
---

## :sparkles: Improvement summary

Briefly describe the existing feature, behavior, or design you would like to improve.

## :mag: Current situation

Explain the current behavior, limitation, or weakness and whether it occurs in a single-file, folder, or workspace scenario.

Why is this improvement worthwhile? What problem would it solve or what value would it add?

## :wrench: Proposed changes

Describe the proposed improvement with operational examples, expected behavior, edge cases, and interactions with existing bookmark, AI, import, export, or configuration systems.

## :white_check_mark: Expected benefits

Explain how the result could be evaluated, such as measurable improvements in usability, accuracy, performance, privacy, security, accessibility, maintainability, or compatibility.

## :warning: Compatibility and risks

Describe any possible effects on existing settings, shortcuts, bookmark data, undo and redo, or cross-device and path-relocation behavior. Leave this blank if unknown.

## :memo: Additional context

Add references, screenshots, benchmarks, related issues, or implementation notes that may help evaluate the proposal.
